name: Wound Healing (Scratch) Assay Analysis
description: Analyze the phase-contrast scratch assay image located at '~/ImageJ_Data/raw/scratch_assay.tif', which shows a cell monolayer with a smooth, cell-free gap (wound). Segment the wound from the textured cell region to create a binary mask where the wound is white (255) and the cells are black (0). Save the mask to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/wound_mask.tif'. Measure the area of the wound and save the results table to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/wound_results.csv'.
